descriptionHtml:
Galeon 550 Fly for sale 2013 | 4 Cabins + 3 Heads | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a stylish and capable motor yacht, consider the Galeon 550 Fly for sale 2013. Combining contemporary design with practical features, this vessel makes a solid choice for anyone seeking comfort, performance, and reliability on the water. This particular Galeon 550 Fly is in good condition, offering all the essential amenities for memorable journeys with family or friends.

Reliable Performance

Outfitted with twin Volvo Penta engines—delivering 800 hp and 588 hp respectively—the Galeon 550 for sale 2013 offers dependable propulsion. She achieves cruising speeds up to 21 knots and a top speed of 24 knots, suitable for both leisurely coastal cruising and longer passages. With a cruising range of 300 nmi, she ensures flexibility whether you prefer short trips or extended adventures.

Specifications:

  • Model: Galeon 550 Fly
  • Year Built: 2013
  • Material: Fiberglass
  • Length Overall: 15.85 metres
  • Beam: 4.69 metres
  • Draught: 2 metres
  • Cabins: 4
  • Heads: 3
  • Engines: Twin Volvo Penta (800 hp & 588 hp)
  • Cruising Speed: 21 knots
  • Maximum Speed: 24 knots
  • Range: 300 km

Equipment & Features:

  • Full navigation electronics: autopilot, radar, plotter, GPS, VHF
  • Air conditioning
  • Bow and stern thrusters
  • Air compressor
  • Battery charger
  • Generator
  • Inverter
  • Electric windlass
  • Fresh water maker

This Galeon 550 Fly for sale 2013 is currently available and maintained in good condition. She presents an opportunity for her next owner to enjoy enjoyable, reliable boating. Whether you are cruising coastal waters or seeking new destinations, her combination of practical layout, reliable power, and convenient onboard systems make her a sensible choice.

For those interested, the Galeon 550 Fly for sale 2013 is worth considering. Contact us for more details, arrange a viewing, and experience for yourself what this well-kept vessel has to offer.
